title: Teach Me to Pole Dance!
overview: The pair finally find the pole dancing school in front of the town's train station. They find Azumi there, but she looks totally different than she did beneath that starry sky. Hinano and Lilia beg her to teach them pole dancing, but...

title: A Magical Girl Joins Us?!
overview: Hinano and Lilia go out to recruit new students for the pole dancing class. They see an unusual-looking girl and ask her to join, and are surprised to find out what gets her excited...

title: More Than One Mountain
overview: The girls hold a small party to celebrate their success, and meet an unexpected talent. Azumi asks her to join without much luck, but when she learns about her past, she becomes determined to bring her to the world of pole dancing.

title: Azumi's Studio Opens For Lessons
overview: Lessons finally begin at Azumi's studio. The four students struggle with their first experience at pole dancing, but feel a sense of fun and achievement like they've never felt before. They get even more excited about pole dancing!

title: AILE d' ANGE, the Rulers of the Dance
overview: The girls increase their number of lessons as they dedicate themselves to pole dancing.  Meanwhile, Yukari Mikoshiro and the rest of her team, AILE d' ANGE, are having a high-level discussion as they prepare for their next competition.

title: Getting Ready for Our First Performance
overview: The girls increase the number of lessons they take as they dedicate themselves to pole dancing. They're finally starting to learn to dance, and getting closer to one another, too. But just before their first performance, something seems odd about Hinano...

title: Wish Upon a Pole Star
overview: The girls increase the number of lessons they take as they dedicate themselves to pole dancing. They're finally starting to learn to dance, and getting closer to one another, too. But just before their first performance, something seems odd about Hinano...
